text:
I made a Brazil World Cup 2026 prediction card and now I am way too invested. That 2002 front line is still the World Cup memory I compare every Brazil attack to.

My question is simple: are they built for those ugly knockout matches, or just the fun open games? Early call: Brazil. What are you changing?

I made an Argentina World Cup 2026 prediction card and now I am way too invested. After that 2022 final, Argentina have main-character energy in every bracket chat.

My question is simple: are they built for those ugly knockout matches, or just the fun open games? Early call: Argentina. What are you changing?

I made a France World Cup 2026 prediction card and now I am way too invested. Mbappe in the 2022 final is still one of the wildest individual World Cup performances.

My question is simple: are they built for those ugly knockout matches, or just the fun open games? Early call: France. What are you changing?

I made an England World Cup 2026 prediction card and now I am way too invested. Kane's World Cup goals and England's 2018 run still hang over the next prediction.

My question is simple: are they built for those ugly knockout matches, or just the fun open games? Early call: England. What are you changing?

I made a Spain World Cup 2026 prediction card and now I am way too invested. The 2010 possession machine still shapes how I think about Spain in knockout games.

My question is simple: are they built for those ugly knockout matches, or just the fun open games? Early call: Spain. What are you changing?

I made a Portugal World Cup 2026 prediction card and now I am way too invested. Ronaldo has given Portugal so many tournament moments that they never feel ordinary.

My question is simple: are they built for those ugly knockout matches, or just the fun open games? Early call: Portugal. What are you changing?

I made a Germany World Cup 2026 prediction card and now I am way too invested. That 7-1 in 2014 still pops up anytime Germany enter a knockout conversation.

My question is simple: are they built for those ugly knockout matches, or just the fun open games? Early call: Germany. What are you changing?

I made a USA World Cup 2026 prediction card and now I am way too invested. Pulisic's 2022 goal against Iran showed how tense and emotional this team can make a World Cup.

My question is simple: are they built for those ugly knockout matches, or just the fun open games? Early call: USA dark-horse run. What are you changing?

I made a Mexico World Cup 2026 prediction card and now I am way too invested. Ochoa turning into a World Cup wall is basically a tournament tradition now.

My question is simple: are they built for those ugly knockout matches, or just the fun open games? Early call: Mexico quarter-final run. What are you changing?

I made a Japan World Cup 2026 prediction card and now I am way too invested. Japan's 2022 comeback energy made them one of the easiest teams to root for.

My question is simple: are they built for those ugly knockout matches, or just the fun open games? Early call: Japan dark horse. What are you changing?

Has anyone started planning around the Brazil group-stage schedule yet? Neymar dragging Brazil through big tournament moments is hard to forget.

I like having fixtures, local time, and team notes in one place before the tournament starts. Which group match are you circling first?

Got excited for World Cup 2026 and started building a small fan hub in my spare time. Mostly schedules, team pages, predictions, and little games for matchday brain.

I am keeping it fan-focused: schedules, team pages, predictions, and simple games rather than anything too serious. Feedback from football people would genuinely help.

Trying to make following the World Cup a little more fun: localized schedules, team guides, prediction cards, and fan games. Keeping it casual.
